title: Information Assurance Standard — NZ Digital Government
description: New Zealand government standard establishing information management controls to ensure collected entity information is accurate, distinctive, and suitable for eligibility and capability decisions. Provides four-level assurance framework (IA1–IA4) for risk-based verification of identity information, covering evidence quality, storage, accuracy, and counter-fraud measures.
owner: Identity and Access Management / Security Architecture
